chunks.text: I 5l ORDER-SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C,P.No.D-169 of 2016. Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For orders on MA No.4693 of 2016. For katcha peshi. 22.09.2016. Mr. Safdar Ali Ghouri, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Akbar Ali Kalhoro State counsel. Leamed counsel for the Petitioner under instructions does not press this petition as the detenues after frling of this petition have been shows arrested in crime No.2412016 registered at Police Station Bhitai Nagar, Hyderab ad on 23'd February 2016, while instant petition was filed lor the detention of the alleged detenues namely Mohammad Hashim, Imran Ali, Abid Ali and Abdul Hakeem on 19.2.2016, who werlT taken away forcibly by the Respondent No.1, on 18.02.2016, after robbing articles 5hown in Para-04, of the petition, hence the petitioner intends to initiate criminal proceedings either by way oflodging FIR or by filing direct complaint against the police officials who detained the alleged detenues under wrongful confinement and thereafter implicated in false case. Petition stands disposed of as apparently it has served the purpose however, the alleged detenues are Ieft at liberty to initiate criminal proceedings in accordance with law against the alleged police officials, if so advised. JUDGE JUDGE S.Arhfaq t
